title: Cooperativa de Ahorro y Crédito Ahorrocoop Ltda ransomware incident

victim.name: Cooperativa de Ahorro y Crédito Ahorrocoop Ltda

extortion.description: Cooperativa de Ahorro y Crédito Ahorrocoop Ltda is a financial services company. The company employs 51-100 people, and revenue ranges from $ 10 to $25 million. The company's headquarters are located at 1421 5 Oriente, Talca, Maule, Chile
